message:
fix(vfs): retry F_SETLK on EAGAIN with busy_timeout backoff

Previously, posix_lock returned Ok(false) immediately on EAGAIN,
ignoring PRAGMA busy_timeout for cross-process lock contention.
Now retries with exponential backoff up to busy_timeout_ms.

Fixes #45

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
